HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Apr-30-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Vincent Fuqua 415-516-2909 Defendant in Pro Per
No other Appearance.

ARGUED. The Court states Plaintiff/Judgment Creditor gave notice on non-appearance. The Court poses questions and looks at Mr. Fuqua's paystub. Mr. Fuqua requests exemption due to financial hardship and requests the funds money being withheld by the Shreiff be returned. Mr. Fuqua indorms the Court he may be able to pay 250-300 dollars towards the judgment. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Taken Under Submission.***

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing, the court signs an order. (see scanned order for details)***

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment (Ccp 473.5)
Off Calendar Apr-27-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT VINCENT FUQUA's Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment (Ccp 473.5).

Off calendar. Defendant fails to show that he served the plaintiff with this motion in compliance with CCP 1005(b).

Judge: Richard C. Darwin, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RCD)
